description: Inspired by pretty women and femininity, this fastrack watch refuses to conform, with its stylish dial. Minimalist design, diamond face and a steel strap to give it a modern feel backed up by a steel case for optimal performance. Wear this with trendy, casual ensembles - colour-pop tees, denims and casual sandals or shoes.Case diameter: 20 mmCase thickness: 5 mmDial shape: Diamond shapeSteel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortSteel strap with a butterfly clasp for comfort and styleSilver and blue dial with branding at the 6 hour mark and brand logo at the 3 hour mark Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 30 meters allowing you to use it when washing your hands or in light rain
